name: 32 Business Man Photo Prompts
summary: Create polished, authoritative executive portraits without expensive photographers. 📷 Our meticulously crafted prompt book delivers 32 battle-tested prompts optimized for Gemini, Nano Banana, and Higgsfield, fully compatible with Character Reference tools for consistent, realistic results. ⚡ Instant digital download.
description: This comprehensive Prompt Book contains 32 meticulously engineered AI prompts specifically designed to generate authentic, boardroom-ready business man headshots that project authority, competence, and executive presence.
prompt: Executive business portrait of a male leader leaning on a white desk, bright modern office background, soft natural lighting from a window, polished professional tone, mid-frame composition
why: A single professional executive headshot session costs $500–$1,500. Add multiple outfit changes, location variations, professional retouching ($200–$400), and you're easily looking at $2,000–$3,000 for a comprehensive portfolio. Then what happens when you need fresh photos in six months? You start over. 😤But what if you could generate studio-quality executive portraits whenever you need them—in minutes, for a fraction of the cost? ✨
